{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Zenith
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[The Engineer]] has been obsessed with finding the [[Zenith]] since she was a girl.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10">''The Engineer'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
